subject: Young female-presenting fighter in orange and red outfit with cap, in fighting stance
description: A young female-presenting humanoid figure stands in a fighting stance. She wears an orange-red jacket and a wide-brimmed cap or hat, with dark shorts and boots. The posture is energetic — weight forward, ready to engage. Energy radiates behind her in yellow-green bursts. The background shows a stylized outdoor scene with blue sky tones and energy effects. The overall impression is of a spirited young fighter brimming with confidence.
foreground: Young fighter in orange-red jacket and cap, energetic fighting pose
background: Yellow-green energy bursts, blue sky tones
